item.title: Open3D Notes 05 | ICP Registration Algorithm
item.author: Author
item.description: 应用 ICP 算法及其变体进行点云局部配准 1. Introduction to ICP ICP (Iterative Closest Point) Registration Algorithm has been a mainstay of geometric registration in both research and industry for many years. The input are two point clouds and an rough initial transformation that roughly aligns the source point cloud to the target point cloud. The initial alignment is usually obtained by a global registration algorithm. The output is a refined transformation that tightly aligns the two point clouds.
